description: Hand-labeled gold set for evaluating the SVO extractor. Each item has a sentence and the expected (subject, predicate, object) triples a correct extractor should produce. Empty 'facts' means the sentence should yield NO facts (e.g. headers, fragments). Matching is lenient: case-insensitive substring on subject+object, and predicate-family aware.

items.text: Marie Curie was born in Warsaw.
Charles Carlsen was President of Johnson County Community College.
Graduation With Civic Honors was published in 2006.
Deborah DeGrate and Chris Engle graduated with civic honors.
Nels Lindahl developed a civic honors program.
Susan Lindahl told Carlsen about the idea.
Thomas Longoria collaborated on the project.
The university becomes a strategic partner.
Dr. Raymond Davis provided advice and guidance.
Johnson County Community College developed a pilot program in 2004.
Albert Einstein developed the theory of relativity.
